protein_name: Corepressor targeting diverse transcription regulators such as GLIS2 or BCL6. Has dehydrogenase activity. Involved in controlling the equilibrium between tubular and stacked structures in the Golgi complex. Functions in brown adipose tissue (BAT) differentiation. Belongs to the D-isomer specific 2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase family. Expressed in germinal center B-cells. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
